Package io.cloudstub.core.internal

Class CloudStubSettings

java.lang.Object
io.cloudstub.core.internal.CloudStubSettings
public final class CloudStubSettings extends Object
Mutable holder for all pre-start configuration of a CloudStub instance.

Populated by CloudStub's fluent withX methods and then consumed (read-only) by the factories and initialisers that build the running engine.

    • enabledServiceIds

      public Set<String> enabledServiceIds()
      Returns:
      the set of enabled service IDs, or null to register every discovered module.

    • storeDirectory

      public Path storeDirectory()
      Returns:
      the persistent store directory, or null for an in-memory store.

    • persistenceBackend

      public StatePersistence persistenceBackend()
      Returns:
      the persistent backend to use when storeDirectory() is set.
